TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Puljekuwan, title = Puljekuwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Puljekuwan} }

S.FORM: Puljekuwan i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Puljekuwan. u kasalumaluma' nu Puljekuwan sa, 42 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 157 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 152 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 78%, Bunun 3%, zumazuma 17%.
S.PHON: pur~…ĺj…ôkuwan i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu pur~…ĺj…ôkuwan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu pur~…ĺj…ôkuwan sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, zumazuma **%.
S.FORM: Puljekuwan i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Puljekuwan. u kasalumaluma' nu Puljekuwan sa, 42 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 157 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 152 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 78%, Bunun 3%, zumazuma 17%.
S.PHON: pur~…ĺj…ôkuwan i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu pur~…ĺj…ôkuwan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu pur~…ĺj…ôkuwan sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, zumazuma **%.
